title: Try these 3 knee strengthening exercises! #seniorfitness #fitnesstips #kneepain #fitnesstips #knee
hook_text: do you have knee pain you need to be doing structured neat exercises to improve the strength exercise number one again use a chair to sit and bring your leg up and now just pulse raise this leg up and down again you will feel it right here do this for 20 total seconds exercise number two we're going to go nice little circles this is challenging but we are working all of these muscles around this now do that for 20 seconds if you need a break after that go ahead but if not we're gonna go the other direction with that leg nice little circles again 20 total seconds once you finish those three do the other side don't just focus on your problem knee always do both sides again three exercises 20 seconds each do both sides hopefully you enjoyed leave a comment below with how you did and as always remember to keep it moving
full_transcript_excerpt: do you have knee pain you need to be doing structured neat exercises to improve the strength exercise number one again use a chair to sit and bring your leg up and now just pulse raise this leg up and down again you will feel it right here do this for 20 total seconds exercise number two we're going to go nice little circles this is challenging but we are working all of these muscles around this now do that for 20 seconds if you need a break after that go ahead but if not we're gonna go the other direction with that leg nice little circles again 20 total seconds once you finish those three do the other side don't just focus on your problem knee always do both sides again three exercises 20 seconds each do both sides hopefully you enjoyed leave a comment below with how you did and as always remember to keep it moving
